Meet Anshul, our new Community Moderator 🛡️

Our Community In Action

N8n Power Users: Join Our Design Team

New human-in-the-loop capabilities add fine-grained control

more highlights >>
Edit

Get ready to meet the n8n community in real life! We’re hosting the second edition of n8n Fest in Berlin to celebrate the big milestones, the growth, and the n8n community.

This is an event for our ambassadors, partners and community members. We’ll also have many familiar faces from the n8n team including Bart and Jan, our CEO.

Expect a night of connections, great food, arcade games and music.

You can register here (please be 100% sure you can come).

See you in Berlin!
